kitchen.title: Kitchen

popup.body:
The Kitchen at the Ken Sargent House is the heart of our home, just as it is in many of your homes, only bigger. 

It’s more than just a place to cook - it’s a gathering spot where patients & their families can prepare meals together, creating a sense of normalcy and connection. 

This communal space fosters togetherness, allowing families to share experiences, support one another, and build bonds. The kitchen also provides a cost-effective alternative to dining out, easing financial strain while offering emotional comfort through familiar, home-cooked meals. 

Your support ensures that this vital space remains a cornerstone of care and continues to nourish both bodies and hearts.

kitchen.placeLead: The Kitchen at the Ken Sargent House is the heart of our home, just as it is in many of your homes, only bigger. It’s more than just a place to cook - it’s a gathering spot where patients & their families can prepare meals together, creating a sense of normalcy and connection.

entrance-to-the-base-level.title: Basement Entrance
entrance-to-the-base-level.description: Approach the base-level entrance of Ken Sargent House from the landscaped grounds. This lower entry provides access to guest spaces on the building's foundation level.

comfort-corner.title: Commual Space

popup.body:
Nestled on each floor of the Ken Sargent House is a small but meaningful communal space. Comfort Corner is designed to bring families together through shared experiences, much like the close-knit region of northwestern Alberta.

These shared areas provide emotional support, fostering a sense of belonging and connection, especially during tough times. Families can relax, share stories, and find strength in each other. It’s a space to create bonds that may transcend their stay, offering comfort and reassurance that they are never alone.

Your support helps us maintain this area, ensuring that families can continue to find peace, community, and hope within our walls.

main-entrance.title: Main Entrance
main-entrance.description: Arrive at the ground-level main entrance of Ken Sargent House. Glass doors open directly into the reception lobby, with an accessible ramp and railings on the left side of the front stairs. Illuminated welcome signage helps visitors find their way, whether arriving during the day or in the evening.

popup.title: Parking Lot
popup.body:
Visitor parking at Ken Sargent House provides convenient, accessible spaces for families and guests arriving for short or extended stays. This naming opportunity will recognize partners who help keep welcome and comfort within easy reach from the moment guests arrive.

Naming details for the parking area will be announced soon. Contact the Foundation to register your interest.

reception.title: Reception

popup.title: Reception Area
popup.body:
As the first point of contact at the Ken Sargent House, the reception area serves as the heart of this home away from home, where families are greeted with care and compassion during their most challenging times. 

Naming this space offers a unique opportunity to leave a lasting legacy, honouring the values of generosity and kindness that the Ken Sargent House embodies. 

By supporting this initiative, you help provide a welcoming environment for families when they need it most, ensuring they feel comforted and supported as they navigate difficult journeys together.

reception.placeLead: As the first point of contact at the Ken Sargent House, the reception area serves as the heart of this home away from home, where families are greeted with care and compassion during their most challenging times. Naming this space offers a unique opportunity to leave a lasting legacy, honouring the values of generosity and kindness that the Ken Sargent House embodies.

overall.title: Overview
overall.description:
Ken Sargent house is designed to blend comfort with modern elegance, and its covered porch is no exception. Extending seamlessly from the home's main living space, the covered porch serves as a perfect transition between indoors and outdoors.

Built with high-quality wood or composite materials, the porch is both stylish and durable, capable of withstanding various weather conditions. Large glass doors often lead to this space, allowing natural light to flood the interior while providing easy access to fresh air.

A signature feature of a (replace a with the) Ken Sargent covered porch is its thoughtful design, incorporating subtle lighting and an inviting atmosphere. Whether used for relaxing mornings with a cup of coffee, sunset gatherings with friends, or peaceful moments under the stars, this porch enhances the overall experience of the home.

Designed with both aesthetics and functionality in mind, the covered porch is a place where architecture and nature come together, creating a serene and inviting retreat.

covered-porch.title: Covered Porch

popup.body:
The outside covered porch at the Ken Sargent House offers families a peaceful escape, where they can step outside and reconnect with nature, much like the expansive, quiet beauty of northwestern Alberta’s landscapes.

This space promotes relaxation, helping families recharge and find comfort in the natural world. 

Whether it’s taking in the sunrise, gazing at the aurora borealis or breathing in the fresh northern air, the porch offers a moment of respite and connection away from the hustle of the healthcare journey.

Your support helps maintain this peaceful retreat, providing families with a sanctuary to refresh and find peace.

covered-porch.placeLead: The outside covered porch at the Ken Sargent House offers families a peaceful escape, where they can step outside and reconnect with nature, much like the expansive, quiet beauty of northwestern Alberta’s landscapes. This space promotes relaxation, helping families recharge and find comfort in the natural world.

dining-area.title: Dining Area

popup.body:
The dining area at the Ken Sargent House is for more than sharing a meal, it’s a space for connection and togetherness. It’s where families gather around the table, share stories, and support each other. 

As the hub of the home, it provides more than just nourishment - it’s a place of comfort, where conversations are plenty and family and friends can visit, play games, and share in conversation.

Your support helps us maintain this special space, ensuring that families have a place to eat, share, and build lasting memories during their time here.

dining-area.placeLead: The dining area at the Ken Sargent House is for more than sharing a meal, it’s a space for connection and togetherness. It’s where families gather around the table, share stories, and support each other. As the hub of the home, it provides more than just nourishment - it’s a place of comfort, where conversations are plenty and family and friends can visit, play games, and share in conversation.

family-patient-communal-space.title: Families & Patients Communal Space

popup.body:
The Family and Patient Communal Space at the Ken Sargent House is a haven designed to bring families together during difficult times to find comfort and connection, building a strong sense of community. This shared space fosters support and camaraderie, helping families navigate difficult times with emotional resilience.

It’s a place, in the main area of the home where families share experiences, offer advice, and build lasting relationships that extend beyond their stay.

This is where the magic of natural support systems are created, where strangers become friends and friends turn into family.

Your support helps us maintain this vital space, ensuring families have a safe, supportive environment to heal together.

family-patient-communal-space.placeLead: The Family and Patient Communal Space at the Ken Sargent House is a haven designed to bring families together during difficult times to find comfort and connection, building a strong sense of community. This shared space fosters support and camaraderie, helping families navigate difficult times with emotional resilience. It’s a place, in the main area of the home where families share experiences, offer advice, and build lasting relationships that extend beyond their stay.

main-floor-stairs.title: Stairwell

popup.title: Stairwell
popup.body: The Stairwell connects families and staff to every part of the home, providing a safe and reliable pathway throughout the space. More than just a transition point, it represents movement, access, and continuity in daily life. Your support ensures that this essential connection remains secure, accessible, and welcoming for all.

main-floor-stairs.placeLead: The Stairwell connects families and staff to every part of the home, providing a safe and reliable pathway throughout the space. More than just a transition point, it represents movement, access, and continuity in daily life. Your support ensures that this essential connection remains secure, accessible, and welcoming for all.

accessible-larger-suites.title: Suite 'A2'

popup.body:
At the Ken Sargent House, our two accessible suites offer families privacy and comfort, giving them a personal space to rest, recharge, and find solace during challenging times.

These suites are designed similarly to suites A in terms of functionality and layout, but are specifically adapted to meet the needs of individuals with disabilities. These adaptations ensure that everyone, regardless of physical limitations enjoy the same privacy and comfort as other guests at the Ken Sargent House.

Each suite includes the necessities - two beds, a bathroom with a shower, and storage for personal belongings - making it a true home away from home.

Your support will help us maintain this essential space.

suite-a.title: Suite 'A'

popup.body:
Suite A offers families a private sanctuary on the main level of the Ken Sargent House during their loved one’s medical treatment.

Each of these eight suites provides privacy and comfort, giving families a personal place to rest, recharge, and find solace during challenging times.

Having an afforadble suite in the Ken Sargent House reduces travel stress and financial burden. It provides a safe place for families to be near their loved ones receiving medical care at GPRH.

All suites include the basic necessities - two beds, a bathroom with a bathtub, and storage for personal belongings - making it a true home away from home.

Your support will help us maintain this safe and comforting environment for families during their time of need.
popup.title: Suite A

suite-a.placeLead: Suite A offers families a private sanctuary on the main level of the Ken Sargent House during their loved one’s medical treatment. Each of these eight suites provides privacy and comfort, giving families a personal place to rest, recharge, and find solace during challenging times.

gazebo.title: Gazebo

popup.body:
The Gazebo at the Ken Sargent House offers a peaceful retreat, set against the serene backdrop of Northwestern Alberta’s breathtaking natural beauty. 

Surrounded by the quiet tranquility of the outdoors, it’s a space where families can unwind, reflect, and find peace amidst the challenges they face. 

For caregivers and families alike, this space provides the perfect opportunity to recharge, away from the clinical environment. 

Whether you’re sitting in the stillness of winter or enjoying the cool northern breeze, the Gazebo is a sanctuary that promotes healing and connection. 

Your support ensures that this tranquil retreat continues to serve families in need of respite.

gazebo.placeLead: The Gazebo at the Ken Sargent House offers a peaceful retreat, set against the serene backdrop of Northwestern Alberta’s breathtaking natural beauty. Surrounded by the quiet tranquility of the outdoors, it’s a space where families can unwind, reflect, and find peace amidst the challenges they face.

pantry.title: Pantry

popup.body:
At the Ken Sargent House, our pantry is more than a place to store food - it’s a vital resource for families.

The pantry offers convenient access to dry goods, snacks, and personal food storage, ensuring that families can focus on what matters most - being there for one another.

It also alleviates financial burdens by offering nutritious, cost-effective options that support the wellbeing of our families. Whether it’s the long winters or the unpredictable weather, the pantry helps families maintain healthy eating habits during challenging times. 

Your support allows us to continue offering this essential service, providing comfort and relief when it’s needed most.

pantry.placeLead: At the Ken Sargent House, our pantry is more than a place to store food - it’s a vital resource for families. The pantry offers convenient access to dry goods, snacks, and personal food storage, ensuring that families can focus on what matters most - being there for one another.

playroom.title: Playroom

popup.body:
The Playroom at the Ken Sargent House offers a burst of joy and creativity for children, allowing them to engage in playful activities and foster growth, even in the midst of adversity. 

In Northwestern Alberta, where winters are long and isolation can set in, the Playroom is a vital space where children can reduce stress, express themselves, and experience moments of happiness. 

This safe and welcoming space encourages social interactions, while giving children a sense of normalcy and fun. 

Your support helps keep this haven alive, offering children and families a much-needed escape and the chance to create memories of joy, even in difficult times.

main-floor-corridor.title: Corridor
main-floor-corridor.description: Explore Main Floor Corridor as part of the Ken Sargent House virtual tour.

laundry.title: Laundry Room

popup.title: Laundry Room
popup.body:
The laundry room at the Ken Sargent House is more than just a convenience - it’s one less hurdle a family has to navigate.

It offers cost savings by eliminating the need for external laundry services and it ensures hygiene and comfort with clean clothes and bedding.

The laundry room, located in the basement of the home, is accessible by elevator and is free for families to use. 

Your support keeps this essential space running, providing comfort and care when families need it most.

laundry.placeLead: The laundry room at the Ken Sargent House is more than just a convenience - it’s one less hurdle a family has to navigate. It offers cost savings by eliminating the need for external laundry services and it ensures hygiene and comfort with clean clothes and bedding.

basement-corridor.title: Corridor
basement-corridor.description: Explore Basement Corridor as part of the Ken Sargent House virtual tour.

social-space.title: Social Space

popup.title: Social Space
popup.body:
Welcome to the Social Space at the Ken Sargent House—a space designed to bring families together. Grab a friend and make yourselves a hot coffee or tea, relax in the comfort of this space that encourages connection, allowing families to share experiences, form supportive relationships, and find comfort in one another. It's a place where stress melts away, and emotional support thrives, as families understand and uplift each other.

Whether you’re spending quality time with loved ones or engaging in house activities, the social space promotes well-being and reduces stress. 

The social space is a place to build lasting relationships, and natural support systems to guide families through their journey and create bonds that extend far beyond one’s stay.

social-space.placeLead: Welcome to the Social Space at the Ken Sargent House—a space designed to bring families together. It's a place where stress melts away, and emotional support thrives, as families understand and uplift each other. Whether you’re spending quality time with…

quite-space.title: Quite Room

popup.body:
Shhhhhhhh, join us in the quiet space/library at the Ken Sargent House, a peaceful retreat - much like the stillness of northwestern Alberta’s vast wilderness.

Here, families can reflect, recharge, and regain their mental and emotional strength. Whether it’s a moment of silence to gather their thoughts, nestled up 
with a good book or a quiet conversation, this space provides the calm needed to stay centered and focused.

The quiet space encourages self care and offers a refuge where families can process their emotions and find renewal. 

Your support ensures that this sanctuary remains a calming and restorative space for families to gather strength.

suite-b.title: Suite 'B'

popup.body:
Suite B offers families a private room on the second floor of the Ken Sargent House during their loved one’s medical treatment at GPRH.

With nine suites available, each room provides a private, comfortable space for families to rest, recharge, and find solace during challenging times.

Staying at the Ken Sargent House has the benefit of reducing travel stress and financial burden. It also ensures families can stay close to their loved ones when it matters most.

All suites include the basic necessities - one bed, a bathroom with a shower, and storage for personal belongings - making it a true home away from home.

Your support will help us maintain this safe and comforting environment for families a during their time of need.

fitness-room.title: Exercise Room

popup.body:
The fitness room at the Ken Sargent House is more than just a place to work out - it’s a place where families can build strength, resilience, and hope in the face of adversity. 

Whether it’s the long northern winters or the endless light of summer, staying active is key to mental and physical wellbeing.Our fitness space helps families reduce stress, stay strong, and cope with the emotional strain of challenging times. For caregivers, it’s an essential outlet, offering a place to release tension and restore balance.

Your support keeps this space active, enabling families to take care of themselves as they care for their loved ones.

suite-a3.title: Suite 'A3'
suite-a3.description: Explore Suite 'A3' as part of the Ken Sargent House virtual tour.

popup.body:
At the Ken Sargent House, our two large suites offer families a private sanctuary during their loved one’s medical treatment.

These larger suites provide privacy and comfort, giving families a personal space to rest, recharge, and find solace during hallenging times.

Suite A3 in the Ken Sargent House reduces travel stress and ensures families can stay close to their loved ones when it matters most.

Each suite includes all the basic necessities - two beds, a bathroom with a shower, and storage for personal belongings - making it a true home away from home.

Your support can help us maintain this vital space, offering families a safe and comforting environment during their time of need.
